docs:
# WebGL Stage
Shared react-three-fiber Canvas wrapper with DPR scaling — used by WebGL Globe and Particle Field.
## Import
```tsx
import { WebGLStage, createFibonacciSphere, useFibonacciSphere, useSpin } from "@/components/ui/webgl-stage";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<WebGLStage color="#a855f7" count={undefined} color="#a855f7" speed={undefined} size={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **color** (string) — default: `"#a855f7"`: Mesh color
- **count** (number): Dot count
- **color** (string) — default: `"#a855f7"`: Color
- **speed** (number): Speed
- **size** (number): Dot size
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add webgl-stage
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/webgl-stage
```
